query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `learningAnalytics` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `date` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `learningSessionsCount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `toursAnalyzed` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `keywordsSuggested` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `skillsSuggested` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `keywordsAccepted` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `keywordsRejected` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `skillsApproved` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `skillsRejected` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `keywordAdoptionRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  `skillAdoptionRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  `sourceDistribution` text,
  `avgProcessingTimeMs` int,
  `totalProcessingTimeMs` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY `uniqueDate` (`date`)
);

  `keywordsSuggested` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,

  `skillsApproved` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `skillsRejected` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `keywordAdoptionRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  `skillAdoptionRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT 0.0000,
  `sourceDistribution` text,
  `avgProcessingTimeMs` int,
  `totalProcessingTimeMs` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY `uniqueDate` (`date`)
);
